title: MikroTik QSFP28 optical module XQ+31LC10D, SM, 10km, 100G
description: XQ+31LC10D is a Singlemode QSFP28 module with a maximum throughput of 100 Gbps, 4 channels, wavelengths 1296 nm, 1300 nm, 1305 nm, 1309 nm and with two LC connectors for connection up to a distance of 10 km . The module is compatible with all active elements from MikroTik and also with devices from other manufacturers "cisco compatibile" with a QSFP28 port The module has built-in digital diagnostic functions (DDMI) including monitoring of optical power, power, temperature, distortion or other key parameters. The module will work in an environment from 0 °C to 70 °C
specsSearch: Optics Format QSFP28 For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 100 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1296 to 1309 Distance [km] 10 Transfer type 2-fiber Polishing type UPC Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Power Max. power consumption [W] 4,5 Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70 General Compatibility Universal Software DDMI - diagnostics Yes
